archimate:Requirement.name: Digital Solution Requirement
archimate:Requirement.documentation:
Definition: A [Digital Solution Requirement] ABB refers to a specific need or condition that must be met or satisfied by a digital system or product to achieve its intended purpose effectively
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
LOST view: Legal view
Viewpoint: EIRA Ontology viewpoint
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DigitalSolutionRequirementRequirement
ABB name: eira:DigitalSolutionRequirementRequirement
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DigitalSolutionRequirementRequirement
Interoperability Layer: N/A

properties.value: A [Digital Solution Requirement] ABB refers to a specific need or condition that must be met or satisfied by a digital system or product to achieve its intended purpose effectively
